pi_items.metadata_value: ESO Very Large Telescope (VLT) - Messier 12 V-band
pi_items.verified_value: ESO Very Large Telescope (VLT) - Messier 12 V-band
pi_items.source: FITS header of Vcomb.fits downloaded from ESA Hubble (TELESCOP='ESO-VLT-U1', TARG NAME='NGC6218-Q1', FILT1 NAME='V_BESS')
Task description and export_result.sh evaluation script
Task description and export_result.sh evaluation script

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a real astronomical image of Messier 12 (NGC 6218) taken by the ESO Very Large Telescope (VLT-U1) in the V-band (V_BESS filter). The image is obtained from the ESA Hubble FITS Liberator dataset. The task expects the agent to detect stars in the image and output a catalog to '/home/ga/AstroImages/measurements/m12_star_catalog.csv' and a summary to '/home/ga/AstroImages/measurements/m12_detection_summary.txt'. The input data is placed in '/home/ga/AstroImages/star_detection'.
